data.content: The API client retries nothing on 429 responses. Add a backoff retry wrapper first, then wire it into the client and run the tests.
Plan: 1) add a withRetry wrapper with exponential backoff, 2) cover it with a focused test, 3) wire it into apiClient.request, 4) run the full API suite.
Added withRetry in src/api/retry.ts with exponential backoff for 429 and 503 responses, and covered fixed and jittered delays in tests/api-retry.test.ts.
Now wire it into the client, then stop there for today.

I started wiring withRetry into apiClient.request in src/api/client.ts, but the non-2xx error path still has a TODO: it does not yet surface the final error after retries are exhausted. I have not run the full API suite yet.
